## Which tool documentation needs improvement?

Tool name and link.

## What kind of improvement?

- [ ] Add more examples
- [ ] Fix errors
- [ ] Add missing sections
- [ ] Update outdated info
- [ ] Improve clarity
- [ ] Other

## Description

Describe the improvement you suggest.

## Suggested content

If you have specific content to add, include it here.
